# ZionBrowser v2.0.1

> Ultra-Lightweight AI Agent Browser Toolkit
> Free & Open Source — MIT License

ZionBrowser is a CLI browser for AI agents written in pure Python with zero external dependencies. It uses ~5MB RAM compared to Firefox's 500MB+.

## Modules
1. ZionBrowser Core — CLI browser with streaming, cookies, forms, caching
2. ZionAgent — Clean Python API for Claude, GPT, and AI agents + MCP server
3. ZionCDP — Chrome DevTools Protocol for JavaScript-heavy sites
4. LION — Learning AI that remembers sites, auth flows, error patterns
5. LION-1 — Auth token hunter + prompt injection shield
6. PIRATE — 8-layer military security defender (~10MB RAM)

## Quick Start
```
git clone https://github.com/ElromEvedElElyon/zion-browser.git
cd zion-browser && python3 setup.py
zion get https://example.com
```

## Requirements
- Python 3.6+
- Any OS (Linux, macOS, Windows)
- No pip packages needed

## Links
- Source: https://github.com/ElromEvedElElyon/zion-browser
